description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Changelog and Release that updates the changelog, bumps the version, and creates a release on a specified branch. The workflow is triggered by a workflow dispatch event with inputs for version type, changelog text, news update, and date addition. It checks out the repository and scripts, installs dependencies, sets up Python 3.9, increments the version and changelog, commits changes, pushes to the branch, and creates a release with the updated changelog and version.
